ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_data" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text entry */,
  "rewire_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the rewire dataset */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* Content of the text (e.g., comment, post) */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the data (e.g., train, validation, test) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the text was posted (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the text was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_data_split FOREIGN KEY ("split") REFERENCES text_splits ("split_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotators" (
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotator */,
  "annotator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the annotator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the annotator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the annotator (e.g., annotator, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being annotated */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator who made the annotation */,
  "label_sexist" TEXT /* Label indicating whether the text is sexist (e.g., sexist, not sexist) */,
  "label_category" TEXT /* Category of the label (e.g., 2. derogation) */,
  "label_vector" TEXT /* Detailed vector of the label (e.g., 2.2 aggressive and emotive attacks) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation (e.g., 0.8) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label_sexist FOREIGN KEY ("label_sexist") REFERENCES sexist_labels ("label_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label_vector FOREIGN KEY ("label_vector") REFERENCES label_vectors ("vector_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES text_data ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_label_category FOREIGN KEY ("label_category") REFERENCES label_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the split (e.g., train) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexist_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., sexist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., 2. derogation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "label_vectors" (
  "vector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vector */,
  "vector_name" TEXT /* Name of the vector (e.g., 2.2 aggressive and emotive attacks) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, annotate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES text_data ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being changed */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "previous_label" TEXT /* Previous label of the annotation */,
  "new_label" TEXT /* New label of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotator_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotator being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance tracking */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the annotator's annotations */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the annotator's annotations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotator_performance_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the model performance tracking */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
